episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

bits.premise: Stateless identity makes origin questions suspicious.
School bullying is free insult therapy.

lines.text: That's right, Tom Frank, no relation.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But I'm going to try and lock in right now, like that great woman.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: My name is, I'm a gypsy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah, that just means I have a hard time answering simple questions like, "Where are you from?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: What are you doing here?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And, "Have you seen my dog?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: My family's from Czechoslovakia.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Back then, wasn't a good time to be Jewish, so it turns out gypsy is just a Jew that lost
lines.label: setup

lines.text: their documents.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Still sucked.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: A lot of people like to remind me, "Hey, that's not a country."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, thanks for reminding me I don't have a home, right?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: We should have been clever and named it something that will stick, like Israel.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Then it would still be around in real today, right?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But I'm a little suspicious, you know?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I think, like, Greenland is an iceberg.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Turkey is full of cats.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then whenever the immigrants come to the border, Hungary is like, "Sorry, we're full."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But it was easy growing up with immigrant parents, actually.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They were clever, you know?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They knew enough kids at school were calling me a fat retard.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: [HORN HONKING]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Why would they pay money for me to hear
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that from a professional?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I used to be fat, but still stupid.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: So the school system is broken.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But fat shaming works.
lines.label: punchline
